news.summary: Ukrainian President Volodymyr Zelensky said he held a positive conversation with US envoys Steve Witkoff and Jared Kushner on Monday, signalling renewed efforts to advance diplomacy over the war with Russia. The call came as European leaders backed a proposed meeting between Zelensky and Vladimir Pu

news.headline: UN human rights leader calls for Cuba sanctions to be ‘lifted immediately’
news.summary: Volker Turk, the UN's high commissioner for human rights, warns that 'children are dying' as result of US oil blockade.

news.headline: Somali referee Artan barred from entering US
news.summary: Omar Artan, who was set to be the first Somali to referee at the World Cup finals, is dropped from the list of officials after he was denied entry to the United States.

news.headline: U.S. Denies Entry to World Cup Referee From Somalia
news.summary: Omar Artan was one of 52 referees selected for the FIFA World Cup. But on Saturday he was denied entry because of “vetting concerns,” U.S. officials said.
